title: Sword Art Online Franchise Gets New Original Film
content: The Sword Art Online franchise 's "Yuna First Live" concert ended its streaming on Wednesday with a teaser for a "brand-new original film." The teaser promises more information in July. (Wednesday's stream recreated the character Yuna's concert from the 2017 Sword Art Online the Movie: Ordinal Scale film.
author: ANN

title: WEBTOON's ShootAround Heads to Big Screen as YA Live-Action Film
content: The project's writer will be Aiyana K. White, ( Severance , The Night Agent ). Susanna Nousiainen's (Suspu) original WEBTOON has accumulated more than 28 million views on WEBTOON .
author: ANN

title: 5 Anime Where the Protagonist Is Genuinely the Most Interesting Character
content: There are many incredible anime protagonists, but few of them stand out as the single most interesting character of their series. Even well-written leads, like Jujutsu Kaisen ‘s Itadori and My Hero Academia ‘s Midoriya, are often overshadowed by more intriguing supporting players .
author: ComicBook

title: Chainsaw Man Set Crunchyroll Record For Highest Viewed Anime at the Time With Season 1, Says MAPPA CEO
content: MAPPA CEO Manabu Otsuka said recently that Chainsaw Man Season 1 set a record for the highest view count on Crunchyroll at the time. (The series debuted in October 2022.) He revealed this in a discussion with writer Tokuriki; you can find his comments on the subject in full below: ALSO READ: Jujutsu Kaisen: Modulo…

title: Machibari's 'Aishiteru, Ore to Issho ni Shinde Kure' Novel Gets Manga Adaptation
content: The June issue of Ichijinsha 's Monthly Comic Zero-Sum magazine announced on Tuesday that Machibari 's Aishiteru, Ore to Issho ni Shinde Kure ~Zense de Watashi o Koroshita Otto ga Naze ka Guigui Sematte Kimasu~ (I love you, Die With Me ~My husband, Who Killed Me in My Past Life, Is Now Aggressively Pursuing Me for…
author: ANN

title: 3 Characters Who Should Have Been “That” Figure in Jujutsu Kaisen Modulo’s Special Chapter (& Not Todo)
content: For the release of Jujutsu Kaisen Modulo ’s third and final volume, it was announced that it would include a special bonus chapter featuring the future appearance of “that” character who never appeared in the sequel.
author: ComicBook

title: Shōwa no Gurazeni Ends 10th Part, Returns in Fall
content: This year's combined 22nd and 23rd issue of Kodansha 's Morning magazine published the 90th chapter of Shōwa no Gurazeni , Kawa 's spinoff of Yūji Moritaka and Keiji Adachi 's Gurazeni: Dai League-hen ( Gurazeni Big League Arc) manga, on Thursday.
author: ANN

title: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie Opens at #1 in Japan, Sound! Euphonium, The Final Movie Part 1 Anime Opens at #4
content: The Super Mario Galaxy Movie — Nintendo , Illumination, and Universal Pictures ' sequel to The Super Mario Bros. Movie — opened at #1 at the Japanese box office. The film sold 1.121 million tickets and earned 1,601,093,600 yen (about US$9.96 million) in its first three days.
author: ANN

title: 10 Best Anime to Binge on Crunchyroll in May 2026
content: The first month of the highly anticipated Spring 2026 anime season is finally over after premiering an exciting lineup of some of the most exciting series ever. The season marked the return of some of their favorite shows, including Dr.

title: Godzilla Minus One Roars Back to Life With Major Revival Thanks to Sequel Hype
content: Godzilla Minus Zero is set to take the world by storm later this year, expanding on the film that helped the kaiju universe earn its first Academy Award. Even though the last time we saw this take on the King of the Monsters was in the ocean’s depths, blown to pieces by Japan’s last-ditch attempt to defeat the kaiju,…
